subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Thou art my namesake and my companion in servitude at His Sacred Threshold. This servant's utmost aspiration [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عبدالبهاء تو سمی منی و در عبودیت آستان مقدس قرین منی این عبد را نهایت آمال
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @spiritual transformation, @power of prayer, @unity; oneness of humanity, @growth of the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @call to action
